northStar: Weekly players who explore a region, solve an ecology problem, and share or return to inspect the changed world.

phases.gate: Five external testers complete the forest detail loop without explanation; at least three immediately retry or inspect another region.

tasks.title: Build the forest zoom-in exploration scene
acceptance: Clicking the forest smoothly enters a detailed paper-cut scene
Watering reveals plant growth and a hidden bird nest
Returning to the valley preserves the changed forest state

tasks.title: Add curiosity signals to five valley regions
acceptance: Forest, mountain, river, volcano, and field each have a subtle motion cue
Hotspots are discoverable without tutorial text
Each hotspot has a unique detail-scene promise

tasks.title: Upgrade rain, growth, fire, ice, and wind feedback
acceptance: Every action produces visible feedback within 150 ms
Successful chains have a clear anticipation, impact, and settle phase
Reduced-motion users receive a readable alternative

tasks.title: Create a no-text first-session tutorial
acceptance: A new player understands select, place, inspect, and return
Tutorial can be skipped
Completion and abandonment events are recorded

phases.gate: D1 retention above 30%, three-session completion above 25%, and median session above five minutes.

tasks.title: Make solved ecology changes persist across sessions
acceptance: Each solved detail scene changes the main valley
The world shows one meaningful overnight change
Save migration is versioned

tasks.title: Add one daily ecosystem mystery
acceptance: Daily challenge uses a deterministic seed
Result does not spoil the solution
Past seven days remain playable

tasks.title: Build a discovery book with hidden conditions
acceptance: Discoveries explain habitat and reaction
Locked entries provide curiosity without revealing exact solutions
New discovery animation is skippable

phases.gate: Share rate above 4%, invite landing-to-play conversion above 25%, and invited-user D1 within 20% of organic D1.

tasks.title: Generate a shareable 8-second ecology replay
acceptance: Replay shows before, action, chain, and reveal
Shared media contains no solution-spoiling input order
Link opens the same challenge directly

tasks.title: Create friend-seed asynchronous challenges
acceptance: Sender and receiver play the same world state
Receiver can start without account creation
Both players see comparison only after completing

tasks.title: Create a short-video creator challenge kit
acceptance: Includes three hooks, five challenge seeds, and clean footage
Creators can link directly to a playable challenge
Attribution parameters are recorded

phases.gate: Retention and growth gates both pass before monetization experiments begin.

tasks.title: Test optional cosmetic biome packs
acceptance: No gameplay advantage is sold
A purchase visibly transforms the personal world
Price test includes lifetime and seasonal options
